code:
//Flor de Fuego

shape(200,0.5,1.5)
.scale(0.5,0.5)
.color([0.5,2].smooth(1),0.3,0)
.repeat(2,2)
.modulateScale(osc(3,0.5),-0.6)
.add(o0,0.5)
.scale(0.9)
.out()

// by Olivia Jack

osc(20, 0.03, 1.7).kaleid().mult(osc(20, 0.001, 0).rotate(1.58)).blend(o0, 0.94).modulateScale(osc(10, 0),-0.03).scale(0.8, () => (1.05 + 0.1 * Math.sin(0.05*time))).out(o0)

// by Rodrigo Velasco
// https://yecto.github.io/

osc(18, 0.1, 0).color(2, 0.1, 2)
.mult(osc(20, 0.01, 0)).repeat(2, 20).rotate(0.5).modulate(o1)
.scale(1, () =>  (a.fft[0]*0.9 + 2)).diff(o1).out(o0)
osc(20, 0.2, 0).color(2, 0.7, 0.1).mult(osc(40)).modulateRotate(o0, 0.2)
.rotate(0.2).out(o1)

// by Zach Krall
// http://zachkrall.online/

osc( 215, 0.1, 2 )
.modulate(
  osc( 2, -0.3, 100 )
  .rotate(15)
)
.mult(
  osc( 215, -0.1, 2)
  .pixelate( 50, 50 )
)
.color( 0.9, 0.0, 0.9 )
.modulate(
  osc( 6, -0.1 )
  .rotate( 9 )
)
.add(
  osc( 10, -0.9, 900 )
  .color(1,0,1)
)
.mult(
  shape(900, 0.2, 1)
  .luma()
  .repeatX(2)
  .repeatY(2)
  .colorama(10)
)
.modulate(
  osc( 9, -0.3, 900 )
  .rotate( 6 )
)
.add(
  osc(4, 1, 90)
  .color(0.2,0,1)
)
.out()

// by Zach Krall
// http://zachkrall.online/

osc(10, 0.9, 300)
.color(0.9, 0.7, 0.8)
.diff(
  osc(45, 0.3, 100)
  .color(0.9, 0.9, 0.9)
  .rotate(0.18)
  .pixelate(12)
  .kaleid()
)
.scrollX(10)
.colorama()
.luma()
.repeatX(4)
.repeatY(4)
.modulate(
  osc(1, -0.9, 300)
)
.scale(2)
.out()

  .luma(0.125)
  .add(shape(7, 0.5)
       .mult(voronoi(10,2).blend(o0).diff(gradient(1)).modulate(voronoi())))
  .scrollY(-0.1)
  .scrollX(0.125)
  .blend(o0)
  .blend(o0)
  .out()

            .modulate(osc().luma()))
  .blend(o0)
  .blend(o0)
  .blend(o0)
  .blend(o0)
  .out()

       .rotate(1.5)).scrollX([0.1,-0.0625,0.005,0.00001],0)
  .scrollY([0.1,-0.0625,0.005,0.00001],0)

    .color(0.5, 0.3)

    .out(o0)

//Pixelscape
//Marianne Teixido
//https://github.com/MarianneTeixido

src(o0)
 .saturate(1.01)
 .scale(.999)
 .color(1.01,1.01,1.01)
 .hue(.01)
 .modulateHue(src(o1).hue(.3).posterize(-1).contrast(.7),2)
  .layer(src(o1)
         .luma()
         .mult(gradient(1)
               .saturate(.9)))
  .out(o0)

noise(1, .2)
  .rotate(2,.5)
  .layer(src(o0)
  .scrollX(.2))
  .out(o1)

render(o0)

// @naoto_hieda
solid(0.2,0.6,0.9).layer(osc(31.4,0).thresh(0.7).luma().modulate(osc(4,1).rotate(1),0.05).color(0,0,0)).layer(osc(31.4,0).thresh(0.7).luma().modulate(osc(4,1).rotate(1),0.1)).out()

//random trypophobia - changes everytime you load it!
//by Ritchse
//instagram.com/ritchse
 
function r(min=0,max=1) { return Math.random()*(max-min)+min; }
 
solid(1,1,1)
  	.diff(shape([4,4,4,24].smooth().fast(.5),r(0.6,0.93),.09).repeat(20,10))
	.modulateScale(osc(8).rotate(r(-.5,.5)),.52)
	.add(
  		src(o0).scale(0.965).rotate(.012*(Math.round(r(-2,1))))
  		.color(r(),r(),r())
    	.modulateRotate(o0,r(0,0.5))
  		.brightness(.15)
  		,.7)
	.out()

//corrupted screensaver
//by Ritchse
//instagram.com/ritchse
 
voronoi(350,0.15)
  	.modulateScale(osc(8).rotate(Math.sin(time)),.5)
  	.thresh(.8)
	.modulateRotate(osc(7),.4)
	.thresh(.7)
  	.diff(src(o0).scale(1.8))
	.modulateScale(osc(2).modulateRotate(o0,.74))
	.diff(src(o0).rotate([-.012,.01,-.002,0]).scrollY(0,[-1/199800,0].fast(0.7)))
	.brightness([-.02,-.17].smooth().fast(.5))
	.out()

//tropical juice

//instagram.com/ritchse
 
voronoi(2,0.3,0.2).shift(0.5)
.modulatePixelate(voronoi(4,0.2),32,2)
.scale(()=>1+(Math.sin(time*2.5)*0.05))
.diff(voronoi(3).shift(0.6))
.diff(osc(2,0.15,1.1).rotate())
.brightness(0.1).contrast(1.2).saturate(1.2)
	.out()

  .scale(() => Math.sin(time)*3)

  .scale(() => Math.sin(time)*2)
  .modulate(noise(2,0))
  .rotate(0.1, 0.9)
.out(o0)

.modulate(osc(500,0,0))
.out(o1)

.out(o2)

// Puertas II
// por Celeste Betancur
// https://github.com/essteban

  .kaleid()
  .mask(shape(4,0.3,1))
  .modulateRotate(shape(4,0.1,1))
  .modulateRotate(shape(4,0.1,0.9))
  .modulateRotate(shape(4,0.1,0.8))
  .scale(0.3)
  .add(shape(4,0.2,1).color(0.3,1,1,0.5))
  .rotate(()=>time)
  .out()

// "the-wall"
// Alexandre Rangel
// www.alexandrerangel.art.br/hydra.html

speed=.0222
osc(48,-.1,0).thresh([.3,.7].fast(.75),0).color(0,0,1)

.add(
    osc(28,.1,0).thresh([.3,.7].fast(.75),0).rotate(3.14/4)
    .color(1,0,0)
    .modulateScale( osc(64,-.01,0).thresh([.3,.7].fast(.75),0) )
)
.diff(
    osc(28,.1,0).thresh([.3,.7].fast(.5),0).rotate(3.14/2)
    .color(1,0,1)
    .modulateScale( osc(64,-.015,0).thresh([.3,.7].fast(.5),0) )
)
.modulateRotate( osc(54,-.005,0).thresh([.3,.7].fast(.25),0) )
.modulateScale( osc(44,-.020,0).thresh([.3,.7].fast(.25),0) )
.colorama( ()=>Math.sin(time/27)*.01222+9.89)
.scale(2.122)

.out()

// "eye of the beholder"
// Alexandre Rangel
// www.alexandrerangel.art.br/hydra.html

noise(6,.05)
.mult( osc(9,0, ()=>Math.sin(time/1.5)+2 ) )
.mult(
    noise(9,.03).brightness(1.2).contrast(2)
    .mult( osc(9,0, ()=>Math.sin(time/3)+13 ) )
)
.diff(
    noise(15,.04).brightness(.2).contrast(1.3)
    .mult( osc(9,0, ()=>Math.sin(time/5)+13 ) )
    .rotate( ()=>time/33 )
)
.scale( ()=>Math.sin(time/6.2)*.12+.15 )
.modulateScale(
    osc(3,0,0).mult( osc(3,0,0).rotate(3.14/2) )
    .rotate( ()=>time/25 ).scale(.39).scale(1,.6,1).invert()
    , ()=>Math.sin(time/5.3)*1.5+3  )
.rotate( ()=>time/22 )
.mult( shape(100,.9,.01).scale(1,.6,1) )
.out()

// "egg of the phoenix"
// Alexandre Rangel
// www.alexandrerangel.art.br/hydra.html

speed=1.2
shape(99,.15,.5).color(0,1,2)

.diff( shape(240,.5,0).scrollX(.05).rotate( ()=>time/10 ).color(1,0,.75) )
.diff( shape(99,.4,.002).scrollX(.10).rotate( ()=>time/20 ).color(1,0,.75) )
.diff( shape(99,.3,.002).scrollX(.15).rotate( ()=>time/30 ).color(1,0,.75) )
.diff( shape(99,.2,.002).scrollX(.20).rotate( ()=>time/40 ).color(1,0,.75) )
.diff( shape(99,.1,.002).scrollX(.25).rotate( ()=>time/50 ).color(1,0,.75) )

.modulateScale(
  shape(240,.5,0).scrollX(.05).rotate( ()=>time/10 )
  , ()=>(Math.sin(time/3)*.2)+.2 )

.scale(1.6,.6,1)
.out()

// ee_2 . MULTIVERSE . time and feedback
// e_e // @eerie_ear
pat = ()=>
solid()
.layer(solid().diff(
  osc((time/16) * 1, (time/1000) * 0.2  )
    .mult(osc((time/8) * 1, (time/1006) * 0.2  ).rotate(1.57))
    .modulate((shape(106,1,0.05)))
    .mult(shape(106,1,0.05))
  ))
  .modulateScale(osc(2,0.125),0.125)
//
solid()
.layer(solid(1,1,1)
  .mult(pat()
  .diff(src(o0).scale(0.2).mult(solid(),[0.7,0.6,0.4,0.6]).kaleid(1.01).saturate(0.3))
)
.layer(solid(1,1,1)
    .mask(
      noise(2,0.05)
      .invert().colorama(2).posterize(8,4).luma(0.25).thresh(0.5)
      .modulateRotate(osc(1,0.5))
    )
    .mult(gradient(0.5).kaleid(1).colorama(2).saturate(1.1).contrast(1.6).mult(solid(),0.45))
  ))
  .out()

speed= 0.5

//ee_5 . FUGITIVE GEOMETRY VHS . audioreactive shapes and gradients
// e_e // @eerie_ear
//
s= ()=>
  shape(4)
.scrollX([-0.5,-0.2,0.3,-0.1,-0.1].smooth(0.1).fast(0.3))
.scrollY([0.25,-0.2,0.3,-0.1,0.2].smooth(0.9).fast(0.15))
//
solid()
.add(gradient(3,0.05).rotate(0.05,-0.2).posterize(2).contrast(0.6),[1,0,1,0.5,0,0.6].smooth(0.9))
.add(s())
.mult(s().scale(0.8).scrollX(0.01).scrollY(-0.01).rotate(0.2,0.06).add(gradient(3).contrast(0.6),[1,0,1,0.5].smooth(0.9),0.5).mult(src(o0).scale(0.98),()=>a.fft[0]*9)
     )
.diff(s().modulate(shape(500)).scale([1.7,1.2].smooth(0.9).fast(0.05)))
.add(gradient(2).invert(),()=>a.fft[2])
.mult(gradient(()=>a.fft[3]*8))
.blend(src((o0),()=>a.fft[1]*40))
.add(voronoi(()=>a.fft[1],()=>a.fft[3],()=>a.fft[0]).thresh(0.7).posterize(2,4).luma(0.9).scrollY(1,()=>a.fft[0]/30).colorama(3).thresh(()=>a.fft[1]).scale(()=>a.fft[3]*2),()=>a.fft[0]/2)
  .out()
//
speed= 1

a.setSmooth(0.96)

// ee_1 . EYE IN THE SKY
//example of mask and function modulation
// e_e // @eerie_ear
noise(18)
  .colorama(1)
  .posterize(2)
  .kaleid(50)
  .mask(
    shape(25, 0.25).modulateScale(
      noise(400.5, 0.5)
    )
  )
  .mask(shape(400, 1, 2.125))
  .modulateScale(osc(6, 0.125, 0.05).kaleid(50))
  .mult(osc(20, 0.05, 2.4).kaleid(50), 0.25)
  .scale(1.75, 0.65, 0.5)
  .modulate(noise(0.5))
  .saturate(6)
  .posterize(4, 0.2)
  .scale(1.5)
  .out();
